stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the system in the annex, if the left fuel tank has less fuel than the right fuel tank, what should the pilots do?

options.a: Force intercross and wait for the tanks to balance.
options.b: Open the crossfeed valve and shut off the left engine pump.
options.c: Close the crossfeed valve and shut off the right engine pump.
options.d: It is not possible to balance the fuel.
